chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr.Tr. Application No.S-81 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.4895/2017 2. For hearing of main case 31-05-2019 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the respondent No.1 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing this Criminal Transfer Application, the applicant has lost his interest, therefore, the same is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
